channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Wed, 10 Jun 2026 09:28:59 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Pakistan bombs Afghanistan again: Taliban claims 11 children among 13 killed
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Watch: Explosion seen at US 5th Fleet headquarters in Bahrain as Iran retaliates
item.description: Iran's IRGC claimed a drone attack on the US Navy's Fifth Fleet headquarters in Bahrain, alleging it was retaliation for recent US airstrikes on Iranian infrastructure. The IRGC stated the operation targeted the base in Manama after US strikes damaged civilian facilities in Jask, Sirik, and Qeshm, warning of stronger responses to further US military action.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Watch: Trump's 'proportional response' to Iran after helicopter attack
item.description: Following Iran's downing of a US Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump ordered retaliatory strikes on Iranian air defense systems. This escalation intensifies months of Middle East tensions, disrupting shipping and raising global energy prices. Iran vowed a "decisive response," casting doubt on ceasefire efforts amid ongoing regional hostilities.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Awami members can fight local polls as independents
item.dc:creator: Ahsan Tasnim

item.title: Nepal to reopen probe into royal palace massacre of 2001
Obsession star Inde Navarrette’s old Twitch streams go viral as fans beg for comeback
item.description: After her breakout role in Obsession, fans were shocked to discover that Inde Navarrette once streamed games on Twitch and YouTube. Old playthroughs of Outlast and The Last of Us quickly went viral, with viewers praising her personality and horror reactions. Social media is now filled with calls for the actress to return to streaming. Many fans believe she could easily balance occasional gaming streams alongside her growing Hollywood career.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: "Charlie wasn’t kidding": Turning Point USA fires back at Candace Owens as Charlie Kirk controversy escalates
item.description: Candace Owens and Turning Point USA became embroiled in a public dispute after Owens questioned the authenticity and context of a viral Charlie Kirk video. Owens claimed the organization ignored her private email seeking clarification, while TPUSA responded publicly, insisting the video was real and accusing her of being “obsessed.” Screenshots of Owens’ alleged email were also shared online, escalating tensions further. The controversy has since sparked intense debate across conservative media circles and social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Soulja Boy warns Kai Cenat over Streamer University 2026 snub and pulls DDG into fresh drama
item.description: Soulja Boy has gone viral after publicly asking Kai Cenat for a place in Streamer University 2026. During a livestream, he warned Kai that he wanted an invitation and later mentioned DDG while discussing their ongoing issues. The clip sparked widespread reactions online, with fans debating whether the comments were serious, playful, or another attempt to grab attention.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: “It doesn’t matter a girls attitude”: Clavicular’s offspring genetics argument draws attention to his rhinoplasty history
item.description: Influencer Clavicular, also known as Braden Peters, sparked debate after saying physical appearance is the most important factor in relationships because it affects future children’s genetics. The viral clip drew criticism from users who pointed to his own rhinoplasty, arguing that cosmetic surgery does not change inherited traits, creating what they see as a contradiction in his argument.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: IShowSpeed lands major FIFA World Cup 2026 role after surprise trailer with Gianni Infantino goes viral
item.description: IShowSpeed has officially partnered with FIFA for the upcoming World Cup 26 Tour. A new FIFA trailer shows the streamer meeting FIFA President Gianni Infantino at FIFA headquarters while announcing plans to travel across the United States, Canada, and Mexico during the tournament. The move follows the inclusion of Speed’s song “World Cup (Champions)” on FIFA’s official 2026 World Cup album.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Who are Alex Zabel and DAA Juice? True crime YouTubers at center of Nancy Guthrie case controversy
item.description: Alex Zabel of CriminalNetwork and Troy Bradshaw, known as DAA Juice, were arrested while covering the Nancy Guthrie abduction case in Tucson. Their arrests led to widespread criticism of Sheriff Chris Nanos and the Pima County Sheriff’s Department online. Supporters say the pair helped keep attention on the case, while the investigation into Guthrie’s disappearance continues.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: 'India feels more vibrant than US': NRI woman on Green Card queue says choosing Bengaluru over San Francisco was the right decision
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: YouTuber Jesse Ridgway blasts in-laws for not supporting wife after ending pregnancy due to Down syndrome
item.description: Jesse Ridgway revealed his wife Ashley faces family estrangement after their difficult decision to terminate a pregnancy due to Down syndrome. He claims some of Ashley's relatives are absent and even join online criticism, intensifying her grief. While his own parents offer support, the couple navigates private sorrow and public backlash, focusing on mutual strength.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Karmelo Anthony found guilty of murdering Texas teen Austin Metcalf at school track meet
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: People were celebrating as my business burned down: Indian entrepreneur in Belfast says he didn't expect this much hatred
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: IShowSpeed reveals FIFA World Cup opening game stream plans as Cristiano Ronaldo fans flood social media
item.description: The IShowSpeedHQ fan account revealed that IShowSpeed has scheduled a YouTube livestream titled “irl stream at World Cup Opening Game” for June 13, 2026. The announcement included a stadium photo of Speed wearing a Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal jersey. Fans are excited to watch his live reactions, football commentary, and energetic content during the FIFA World Cup opener.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Indian-origin Dr Ashok Muralidaran under fire over wrong heart surgery in Oregon: 'India gives fake degrees'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: US visa interview in 10 days if you pay extra $750: All you need to know
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: UK school stabbing: 14-year-old girl arrested after teacher and two pupils injured in Manchester
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian students asked 'how do I get a data engineering job in the US': Tech founder says $100K H-1B visa fee made the answer depressing
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
